test.create_query: CREATE TABLE str_sort (a String, b UInt64, c FixedString(5), d String, e UInt32, f UInt32) ENGINE = Memory
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO str_sort SELECT randomString(4) AS a, rand() AS b, cast(randomString(5) AS FixedString(5)) as c, toString(rand() % 100000) as d, rand() % 1000 as e, rand() % 1000 as f FROM numbers(1e7)
test.query: SELECT a, b FROM str_sort ORDER BY a, b, e, f FORMAT Null
SELECT b, c FROM str_sort ORDER BY b, c, e, f FORMAT Null
SELECT a, d FROM str_sort ORDER BY c, d, e, f FORMAT Null
test.create_query: CREATE TABLE str_sort_long (a String, b UInt64, c FixedString(128), d String, e UInt32, f UInt32) ENGINE = Memory
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO str_sort_long SELECT randomString(64) AS a, rand() AS b, cast(randomString(128) AS FixedString(128)) as c, randomString(256) as d, rand() % 1000 as e, rand() % 1000 as f FROM numbers(5e6)
test.query: SELECT a, b FROM str_sort_long ORDER BY a, b, e, f FORMAT Null
SELECT b, c FROM str_sort_long ORDER BY b, c, e, f FORMAT Null
SELECT a, d FROM str_sort_long ORDER BY c, d, e, f FORMAT Null
